revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:愛宕祭]]
'''Atago Matsuri''' (愛宕祭, Atago Matsuri or Atago Sai) refers to festivals held at various {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qid=Q713021|lt=Atago Shrines|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}} or in the vicinity of {{ill|Mount Atago|ja|愛宕山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Atago|1=Mount Atago|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11493827}} across Japan. * {{ill|Atago Matsuri (Machida)|ja|愛宕祭 (町田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Matsuri (Machida)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502349|1=Atago Matsuri (Machida)}} - {{ill|Sugawara Shrine (Machida)|ja|菅原神社 (町田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara Shrine (Machida)|1=Sugawara Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11619212}}, Machida City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Ōro Atago Matsuri|ja|大呂愛宕祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōro Atago Matsuri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502350|1=Ōro Atago Matsuri}} - Ōro, Okuizumo Town, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Mitsunari Atago Matsuri|ja|三成愛宕祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsunari Atago Matsuri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502353|1=Mitsunari Atago Matsuri}} - Mitsunari, Okuizumo Town, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Atago Matsuri (Konan City)|ja|愛宕まつり (湖南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Matsuri (Konan City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502354|1=Atago Matsuri (Konan City)}} - Kōnan City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Atago Matsuri (Takarazuka)|ja|愛宕祭 (宝塚市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Matsuri (Takarazuka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502356|1=Atago Matsuri (Takarazuka)}} - {{ill|Iwashizu Shrine|ja|伊和志津神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashizu Shrine|1=Iwashizu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11379248}}, Takarazuka City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|qq=}} - Tanba City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Atago Matsuri (Kashihara)|ja|愛宕祭 (橿原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Matsuri (Kashihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502357|1=Atago Matsuri (Kashihara)}} - Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Ainoura Atago Matsuri|ja|相浦愛宕祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ainoura Atago Matsuri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502359|1=Ainoura Atago Matsuri}} - Ainoura area, Sasebo City, Nagasaki Prefecture. {{Ambiguity|qq=}} {{disambiguation}} {{Atago Faith|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|愛宕祭|version=100661473|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:愛宕祭]]
<!--Atago Matsuri--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q11493868}} [[Category:愛宕信仰]]
